title: refactor(gen-text): remove dead Portkey/client-config branches and unused fields
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Remove the unreachable Portkey `strategy`/`targets` fallback-config branch + `PortkeyTarget`/`resolveTargetAuth`
- Drop dead config fields never set: `removeSeed`, `formatResponse` (+ orphaned `sseStreamConverter.ts`), `authHeaderName`/`authHeaderValue`
- Remove the never-matched model-config sampling-default loop and dead `targets`/`hasBase64Target` handling in the image transform
- Remove unused `ServiceError.originalProvider` field

Verified non-breaking: biome clean, affected tests green vs the main baseline. Net −179 lines.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Pruning the dead branches
gist.blurb: We did some spring cleaning in the text generation codebase, removing unused configurations and dead code to keep the hive running lean and mean.
gist.summary: Removed 179 lines of dead code and unused configuration fields from the text generation service, including unreachable Portkey fallback branches and orphaned stream converters.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup simplifies the codebase and reduces technical debt without affecting existing API functionality.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some spring cleaning, pruning dead branches from a code-plant while the Nomnom creature eats the discarded code snippets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, pruning dead pixelated leaves off a glowing code-plant. The round tan nomnom creature sits below, happily eating the discarded code snippets. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
